title: Contribute to regional planning process
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to regional planning process demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Participate in panels and group discussion on the planning process

pcs.text: Submit natural resource management issues, economic and social factors, and potential solutions or directions to groups for discussion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit natural resource management issues, economic and social factors, and potential solutions or directions to groups for discussion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit natural resource management issues, economic and social factors, and potential solutions or directions to groups for discussion.

pcs.text: Ensure contributions are positive to assist group to develop course of action and recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure contributions are positive to assist group to develop course of action and recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure contributions are positive to assist group to develop course of action and recommendations.

pcs.text: Structure contributions to discussions with panels and groups to comply with legislative, program and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Structure contributions to discussions with panels and groups to comply with legislative, program and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Structure contributions to discussions with panels and groups to comply with legislative, program and workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Participate in panels and group discussion on the planning process

elements.title: Collect data and background information

pcs.text: Collect information on local natural resource management issues and survey local groups, projects and programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information on local natural resource management issues and survey local groups, projects and programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information on local natural resource management issues and survey local groups, projects and programs.

pcs.text: Make arrangements for additional data to be collected for input into analysis and the planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make arrangements for additional data to be collected for input into analysis and the planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make arrangements for additional data to be collected for input into analysis and the planning process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect data and background information

elements.title: Contribute to the plan

pcs.text: Highlight local natural resource management issues to the planning team for inclusion in planning considerations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Highlight local natural resource management issues to the planning team for inclusion in planning considerations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Highlight local natural resource management issues to the planning team for inclusion in planning considerations.

pcs.text: Explore relationship between local and wider issues to submit views on natural resource management priorities and solutions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explore relationship between local and wider issues to submit views on natural resource management priorities and solutions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explore relationship between local and wider issues to submit views on natural resource management priorities and solutions.

pcs.text: Review draft plans in terms of impact on the local and wider region to identify deficiencies and propose solutions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review draft plans in terms of impact on the local and wider region to identify deficiencies and propose solutions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review draft plans in terms of impact on the local and wider region to identify deficiencies and propose solutions.

pcs.text: Ensure participation in community consultation assists the regional planner to obtain feedback on the draft plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure participation in community consultation assists the regional planner to obtain feedback on the draft plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure participation in community consultation assists the regional planner to obtain feedback on the draft plan.

pcs.text: Develop proposal for improvement to draft plan based on natural resource management and regional context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop proposal for improvement to draft plan based on natural resource management and regional context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop proposal for improvement to draft plan based on natural resource management and regional context.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Contribute to the plan
